---
title: "conftest.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\conftest.py"
loc: 135
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 6.14
overall_score: 1.77
---

## Intent
The `conftest.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on mock_genai_client, temp_project, isolate_workspace, prevent_api_key_leak, isolate_warden_state, _cleanup, mock_mimir_globally, reset_hud_singleton, _get_hud_instances, _full_reset. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_genai_client, temp_project, isolate_workspace, prevent_api_key_leak, isolate_warden_state, _cleanup, mock_mimir_globally, reset_hud_singleton, _get_hud_instances, _full_reset. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 25 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [os](file://os)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `mock_genai_client`
- `temp_project`
- `isolate_workspace`
- `prevent_api_key_leak`
- `isolate_warden_state`
- `_cleanup`
- `mock_mimir_globally`
- `reset_hud_singleton`
- `_get_hud_instances`
- `_full_reset`
